items.title: Tool Failure Recovery Engine
items.problem: Autonomous agents stall when tool calls fail transiently or return partial data.
quality_tests: Recovers from simulated transient failures within configured retry budget
Never retries terminal auth/permission errors blindly
Resumes from last checkpoint without duplicate side effects

items.title: Approval Gate Orchestrator
items.problem: Agents need predictable human approval checkpoints before high-impact writes.
quality_tests: All high-risk actions pause for explicit approval
Approval packets include scope, impact, and rollback details
Denied actions are not executed under retry paths

items.title: Spend-Aware Model Router
items.problem: Agent costs spike when every task is routed to expensive models.
quality_tests: Routes low-complexity tasks to lower-cost models without quality loss beyond threshold
Hard budget caps are enforced under load
Telemetry reports per-task cost attribution

items.title: Source-Grounded Claim Verifier
items.problem: Autonomous outputs lose trust when factual claims are uncited or weakly sourced.
quality_tests: Each material claim is linked to at least one source
Contradictory sources are surfaced with clear flags
Low-authority sources are downranked per policy

items.title: Plan-Decompose-Execute Loop
items.problem: Agents fail multi-step tasks when planning and execution are mixed ad hoc.
quality_tests: Produces acyclic dependency graph for test tasks
Replans only affected branches after step failure
Final output satisfies all declared acceptance checks

items.title: Connector Health Sentinel
items.problem: Third-party API connectors silently degrade and break automations.
quality_tests: Detects connector degradation before hard outage in fixture
Triggers circuit breaker at configured thresholds
Alerts include likely root cause and next action

items.title: Long-Horizon Task Tracker
items.problem: Autonomous work spanning days loses continuity and deadlines.
quality_tests: Milestones persist and restore across sessions
Stalled tasks are flagged after inactivity threshold
Progress summaries correctly reflect completed subtasks

items.title: Memory Schema Steward
items.problem: Agent memory becomes noisy and inconsistent without schema discipline.
quality_tests: Rejects writes missing required schema keys
Deduplication merges semantically equivalent entries
Schema migration preserves historical references

items.title: Autonomous Inbox + Calendar Operator
items.problem: Daily communications and scheduling are high-frequency workloads ideal for safe autonomy.
quality_tests: Urgent threads are ranked above informational mail
Proposed meeting slots respect timezone and constraints
No outbound send occurs without configured approval

items.title: Incident Auto-Remediator
items.problem: Ops teams need faster first-response actions during incidents.
quality_tests: Correlates duplicate alerts into single incident context
Executes only allowlisted remediation steps
Rollback is triggered when health checks remain red

items.title: Runbook Executor (Safe Mode)
items.problem: Runbook automation can cause damage without guardrails and bounded execution.
quality_tests: Dry-run output matches planned execution steps
Execution halts on failed precheck
All step outputs are captured for audit

items.title: Browser Workflow Autopilot
items.problem: Many business workflows still require brittle browser interactions.
quality_tests: Completes target form workflow in staging environment
Recovers from minor layout changes via fallback selectors
Escalates gracefully on anti-bot/CAPTCHA blocks

items.title: Multi-Agent Coordinator
items.problem: Parallel sub-agents duplicate work and conflict without orchestration.
quality_tests: Subtasks are partitioned without overlap for benchmark job
Shared state updates resolve deterministically
Final synthesis includes outputs from all assigned roles

items.title: Human Escalation Judge
items.problem: Agents need consistent criteria for when to escalate uncertainty to humans.
quality_tests: High-uncertainty cases always trigger escalation
Escalation bundle includes evidence and alternatives
Low-risk routine actions avoid unnecessary escalations

items.title: Policy Drift Detector
items.problem: Operational behavior drifts away from policy over time.
quality_tests: Detects known historical policy violations in fixture
Distinguishes approved exceptions from violations
Trend metrics update correctly over rolling windows

items.title: Compliance Evidence Collector
items.problem: Audit preparation is slow because evidence is scattered across tools.
quality_tests: Each control maps to at least one artifact
Captured artifacts include immutable timestamps
Export pack passes sample auditor checklist

items.title: PII Redaction Firewall
items.problem: Agents may leak personal data in logs, prompts, or outbound messages.
quality_tests: Masks all PII entities in benchmark corpus
Preserves non-sensitive context readability
Outbound scan blocks messages with unredacted sensitive fields

items.title: Secret Leak Preventer
items.problem: API keys and credentials can be accidentally exposed during autonomous operations.
quality_tests: Detects known secret formats with high recall
Blocks outbound payloads containing detected secrets
Logs include leak context without exposing raw secret

items.title: API Contract Watchdog
items.problem: Autonomous integrations break when upstream APIs change silently.
quality_tests: Flags removed/renamed fields as breaking changes
Maps impacted consumer workflows accurately
Generates actionable migration notes

items.title: Change Review Gatekeeper
items.problem: Risky production changes slip through shallow reviews.
quality_tests: High-risk diffs are blocked pending required approvals
Detects config/secret modifications with precision threshold
Rollback checklist is complete before merge

items.title: Release Readiness Auditor
items.problem: Releases fail when QA, docs, and rollout checks are incomplete.
quality_tests: Aggregates all required readiness artifacts
Blocks go decision when critical checks are missing
Canary plan includes abort criteria

items.title: Synthetic Monitor Builder
items.problem: Teams miss user-facing regressions without proactive synthetic checks.
quality_tests: Generated probes cover specified critical journeys
Alerts fire on injected failures within SLA
Flaky probes are identified and quarantined

items.title: Customer Support Resolution Agent
items.problem: Support queues grow when triage and response drafting are inconsistent.
quality_tests: Classifier meets target precision for critical tickets
Drafts cite knowledge sources for policy-sensitive answers
Escalates unresolved high-severity tickets within SLA

items.title: CRM Follow-up Autopilot
items.problem: Revenue is lost when reps miss timely follow-ups and CRM hygiene degrades.
quality_tests: Detects stale opportunities by configured inactivity rules
Draft follow-ups align with last interaction context
CRM updates are idempotent across reruns

items.title: Meeting-to-Action Operator
items.problem: Meeting decisions are not converted into tracked actions reliably.
quality_tests: Extracted actions match human-labeled benchmark
Owner/due-date completeness exceeds threshold
Synced tasks remain consistent after edits

items.title: Procurement Risk Screener
items.problem: Vendor onboarding slows down due to manual risk and contract checks.
quality_tests: Flags critical contract clauses in benchmark set
Security questionnaire triage matches policy rubric
Risk memos include clear approve/mitigate/reject rationale

items.title: Invoice-to-Payment Controller
items.problem: AP teams face delays and errors validating invoices against policy and contracts.
quality_tests: Three-way match detects amount and vendor mismatches
Duplicate detection catches known duplicate fixtures
Exceptions are routed with required evidence attached

items.title: Travel Disruption Replanner
items.problem: Travel disruptions require rapid, multi-constraint replanning.
quality_tests: Detects schedule disruptions from sample feeds
Rebooking options satisfy stated constraints
Notifications include updated ETAs and confirmation steps

items.title: Personal Admin LifeOps
items.problem: Consumers struggle to keep up with recurring life administration tasks.
quality_tests: Reminder schedule respects user timezone and lead times
Checklist completion state persists accurately
Weekly digest includes only pending actionable items

items.title: Research Brief Factory
items.problem: Knowledge workers need rapid, evidence-backed briefs under tight deadlines.
quality_tests: Brief includes citations for major claims
Counterpoints are sourced and relevant
Executive summary remains faithful to full brief

items.title: Data Quality Reconciler
items.problem: Autonomous analytics fail when upstream data has silent quality defects.
quality_tests: Detects seeded schema and completeness issues
Reconciliation catches key mismatches across tables
Severity scoring prioritizes business-critical defects

items.title: Spreadsheet Ops Agent
items.problem: Operational teams rely on spreadsheets for workflows that are repetitive and error-prone.
quality_tests: Formula checker detects broken references in fixture
Transforms preserve row-level IDs and totals
Generated reports match expected template schema

items.title: SQL Insight Analyst
items.problem: Teams need natural-language-to-SQL analysis with guardrails against bad queries.
quality_tests: Generated SQL passes lint and runs on test warehouse
Safety layer blocks full-table destructive statements
Narrative explanation matches query output

items.title: KPI Anomaly Explainer
items.problem: Teams see KPI spikes/drops but lack fast root-cause hypotheses.
quality_tests: Detects synthetic KPI anomalies with target recall
Drilldowns isolate top contributing segments
Recommendations map directly to identified drivers

items.title: Social Listening Response Drafter
items.problem: Brands miss timely responses to high-signal social mentions.
quality_tests: High-impact mentions are prioritized correctly
Drafts conform to tone and policy constraints
Risky mentions trigger escalation path

items.title: Moderation Safety Triage
items.problem: Communities need consistent moderation decisions across high message volume.
quality_tests: Violation detection hits benchmark precision threshold
Recommendations are consistent across similar cases
Appeal logs preserve original evidence references

items.title: Growth Experiment Orchestrator
items.problem: Teams run A/B tests without strong hypothesis tracking or result quality.
quality_tests: Experiment setup includes hypothesis and success criteria
Guardrail metrics are enforced during runtime
Decision log captures rationale and confidence

items.title: Ad Creative Feedback Loop
items.problem: Creative iteration cycles are slow and disconnected from performance data.
quality_tests: Generates distinct variants across message angles
Maps performance metrics to specific creative attributes
Next-iteration prompts reflect observed results

items.title: Onboarding/Offboarding Operator
items.problem: Access and equipment workflows are inconsistent during employee lifecycle events.
quality_tests: Mandatory lifecycle tasks are created for each event
Deprovisioning checklist completes within policy SLA
Compliance report highlights incomplete critical steps

items.title: Autonomous QA Regression Planner
items.problem: Rapid release cadence makes manual regression planning too slow.
quality_tests: Prioritizes tests covering changed high-risk components
Skips blocked tests when environment checks fail
Defect triage summary groups duplicates correctly
